//: Repo markdownlint rules. MD013 line-length relaxed to 120 (prose only). MD060 (table-pipe spacing) and MD036 (emphasis-as-heading) are off: the repo intentionally mixes compact ADR + padded doc tables, and uses intentional bold labels (Do / Don't) in style/brand docs - neither is a defect. Runner globs/ignores live in .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc.
